name: JUURYU NAGE: RAIGA BAKUDAN (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: LIGHTNING CRASH SUPER BOMB)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 4

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 31

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target is your size category or smaller. If you are grappling the target, make an opposed grapple check. Otherwise, you must initiate a grapple after a 10 ft drop or while benefiting from Strength Rank 5 or greater. This does not provoke an attack of opportunity. If you succeed, you deal your unarmed attack damage as though you were one size category larger, and deal 1d6 bonus damage for each Strength and Speed Rank you currently benefit from (up to 20d6).

On hit, the target is left prone and stunned for 2 rounds. A successful Fortitude save leaves it prone and staggered for 2 rounds instead. Either way, the target is also left prone.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 total bonus damage.
